author: Chidera Ibe
name: E2E TTT (MLP-Only, Last 1/2 Blocks) on PR #1493 Base — Non-Record Idea Submission
technique_summary: End-to-End TTT (arxiv:2512.23675) — score-first SGD on MLP layers only, restricted to last half of blocks (blocks 5-10 of 11). Paper-aligned: freezes embeddings/attention/norms per paper's finding that updating them causes instability. Config: TTT_LR=0.015, TTT_EPOCHS=2, TTT_E2E_LAST_FRAC=0.5, QK_GAIN_INIT=5.0, SP1024.

compliance.non_record_reason: Single-seed idea submission demonstrating E2E TTT technique; SP1024 used (SP8192 data not available to us); TTT gain at 27M scale is marginal (~0.001 BPB)

attribution.e2e_ttt_paper: arxiv:2512.23675 (End-to-End Test-Time Training for Long Context, ICLR 2026)
